entries.name: I-Ching (Book of Changes)
entries.definition: I-Ching (Book of Changes) provides comprehensive wisdom for governance through authentic spiritual principles and practical magical knowledge.
roles: Uses I-Ching (Book of Changes) principles for empowerment
contributions: I-Ching (Book of Changes) teaches authentic self-expression in leadership
Wisdom governance balances authority with compassion
True power serves the highest good of all beings

attributes.governor_essence: A I-Ching (Book of Changes) Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by i ching principles.
relationship_approaches: Connects through I-Ching (Book of Changes) understanding
